name: Deutsche Lufthansa AG
description: Deutsche Lufthansa AG is a leading global aviation group headquartered in Germany. It operates as a multi-hub airline system, comprising passenger airlines such as Lufthansa, SWISS, Austrian Airlines, and Brussels Airlines, alongside Eurowings. Beyond its core passenger transport business, the Lufthansa Group is a major player in aviation services, including logistics, maintenance, repair, and overhaul (MRO), and catering. With a commitment to sustainability and innovation, the group connects people, cultures, and economies worldwide, maintaining a significant presence in the global aviation market through its extensive network and diverse portfolio of specialized aviation companies.
